# Copilot Instructions for `nuget-exam`

## Documentation rules

- Write documentation in English.
- Write for external package consumers, not for internal collaborators.
- Prefer product-style documentation with sections such as package selection, getting started, guides, and API reference.
- Do not mention AI agents, collaboration workflow, intermediate status, migration slices, or internal working notes in published documentation.
- When in doubt, follow the tone and structure of official product documentation.

## Scope

- Keep documentation focused on `Italbytz.Exam.*` and `Italbytz.Trivia.*` usage in reusable exam and quiz scenarios.
- Favor concise, skimmable guidance over roadmap language.
